heading: Vercel
body:
[Vercel](https://vercel.com/) is a cloud platform for static frontends
and serverless functions. It enables developers to host websites and web
applications that deploy instantly, scale automatically, and require no
supervision. Vercel integrates with the Next.js framework.

You can easily use Vercel with Atlas.

To provision and use MongoDB Atlas as your application's database directly
from Vercel Marketplace using a simplified setup process and integrated billing
through Vercel, see [Integrate with Vercel](vercel).
